MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-16-2005 IN 206, DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY CLUB'S MOTION TO VACATE AND CONTINUE TRIAL AND DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATES WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/11/05 IS CONTINUED TO 4/3/06 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT E. DONDERO; CLERKS: V.MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR #3321 (206)
